text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand digital images and videos. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition allows computers to classify what an image shows, such as identifying a cat or a flower. Object detection goes further by locating specific objects within an image and drawing boxes around them. These technologies have many real-world applications. For example, they are used in smartphones for face unlocking, in medical imaging to help doctors find diseases, and most notably in self-driving cars. Autonomous vehicles use computer vision to detect pedestrians, road signs, and other cars, allowing them to navigate safely.
